claim: DM1 V1 PC34 viewport explosion zone routing is source-locked for D0C pattern, centered, two-cell, and rebirth overlay paths.
firestaffChecks: DM1_ViewportExplosionOcclusionSpec encodes G2034 regular explosion rows, G2035 field aspects, and G2028 rebirth rows for every PC34 view square with a regular explosion zone.
test_dm1_v1_viewport_3d_pc34_compat validates C004 D0C pattern zone, C3014 centered zones, C3031 two-cell zones, and C3000/C3007 rebirth step zones.
nonClaims: Does not claim pixel parity against DOS captures.
Does not change movement, collision, creature-specials, or projectile lifecycle behavior.
